segments.text: Last night was the Night of Complete Darkness that they call it as a mavasya and just now
only, first phase on moon has started.
Today we are here to celebrate day when Sahastrara was opened out also you have seen in photograph
It was actually a photograph of My brain which showed how the Sahasrara was opened out.
The light from the brain now could be photographed, something great these modern times have done
so that modern time has brought lot things
which can prove the existence of The Divine, also it can prove about Me.
It can convince you what I am."
This is very important because in modern times
this advent has to be recognized –
Has been fully recognized!
That's one condition for all Sahaja Yogis
Now let's see what is happening in the modern times,
In brains of people.
If you see, there is an attack on the Sahasrara.
There has been a attack since long but in modern times it's
worst time that they are trying to make
limbic area very insensitive
Very depressive novels
very depressing thoughts and
very depressive music, you can say like Greek tragedy nonsense.
All these things came from the medieval period till we should say this new age has started
that one itself was no good for our limbic area –
That made us very depressive, we took to alcoholism
To escape from these so-called miseries
But then came this modern age
In which people became overactive
Overactivity started
With that the brain also become over active
In addition to the dullness before, has gone into another extreme of over-activity.
So they took it again to drugs and very horrible music
that's how made this limbic area very insensitive
so a drug which was just stimulus
to begin with, was to be taken in greater quantity and later on they had
take the drugs which were of a much more severe nature.
Went down like that
And now we know
That this drug is
The only way people think
They can survive
Why?
Because
Of these tensions
they talk of.
In the modern times we have something called tensions, it was never there before people
ever talked about their tension now everybody says I am in a tension you give me attention
what is this tension?
It's because my advent the limbic area wants to know and kundalini also as sahaja
Yoga is increasing, it's trying to rise in people because you become the channels.
Wherever your go ,you generate vibrations and these vibrations give a challenge
To The Kundalini or A message
And In various People It Rises
It may not rise up to the Sahastrara, or it may even raise up to Sahasrara but it falls
back because there's no recognition.
So every time they do something this Kundalini comes out and gives them a pressure
– because their Sahasrara is not open!
Its'a closed door.
Because of that closed door
This gives them a kind of pressure in the head, which they don't understand and
call it as tension.
Actually kundalini is trying to push itself out but cannot.
And those also who get their realization if do not make Sahasrara all right
They go on getting into tensions
So, though Sahastrara has been opened out so many years back still we have some things
to be done which is clear our Sahasrara first of all.
First the breaking up this Sahasrara then one it opened-out, the Brahmarandra opened
out, then we started feeling the grace and it moved on to our idaa and pingala –
The Grace. Not Kundalini! And the Grace which is Chaitanya all round
soothed down left-and right side by
which our chakras opened more and more threads of the kundalini started piercing through.
So I always tell Sahaja Yogis that it's important, you must meditate!
If your Sahastrara is alright all your chakras will be alight because as we know
pithas or controlling centers are in brain around the limbic area so if your Sahastra
is clear. Everything works out in a very different way, how to keep the Sahasrara all right?
It's big problem always people ask Me – you know that I reside on the Sahastra.
I have incarnated on the lotus of one thousand petals, that's why could break it also.
As i am today as you see me off course they say Sastare Mahamaya so this is illusion
which all time there for You ,which very illusive .It had to be that way because
You could not have faced Me otherwise, with all the lights coming out of me or
The way you saw yesterday Sahasrara some sort of abstract colors thrown on
All sides and the light's thrown outside. Please don't take photograph when
I'm speaking alright? We can
Take lateron there is no hurry about it just pay attention to my lecture
Please pay attention, it's important.
It is to be told beforehand that nobody should take photographs during puja
because its a very intense thing one has work out
please pay attention even if you don't understand
so I would request for full attention
when i am talking
Now this Sahastrara used by looked after
You, is the temple of your Mother.
When you say,"You put Me in The Heart", actually
Put me In the Sahasrara because as
As we know the Brahma Randra here
Is a fontanel bone area has got
The pitha ,the center which controls
The heart . Which i s t he seat
Of the Sadashiva or
What can be said of Shiva
So when you put Me
In Heart Actually you put Me there
So, to raise it from heart there or to bring in form of the heart is a problem for two types
people.
Some who are sensitive with their hearts – I would say that in Europe we can say
Italians have been very sensitive on your heart…
The first thing they do as soon you see Me and put their hands towards Your Heart
And that is what it is,
if you try to feel Me in your heart
–to begin with. It's much easier
To Feel me In Your Heart
Now You might say how do I do it?
You have love Me as I Love You
.You've got to love each one of yourself
because all are within Me
and you cannot teach someone
How to love
Love Is Within
And love manifests if just you open your heart, now what stops it we should examine that.
Firstly the conditioning in the West see to express
Your Love is regarded as sinful actually
It takes them time say I love You but
But even a child would go on saying
I hate you, but to hate someone is sinful.
To anyone – it's sinful!
So saying that,"I hate You",
Is a sinful act
so what one has do
Go on and say
I love you
After all
who is so dear
Anyone
Who has
done something good for
You love that person, but if the Adi Shakti Herself has given you the rebirth it should
be easiest thing to Love and If She says they are all within My body so It would even
easier for them each other.
So whole cleansing of the Sahastrara is done through this Love.
This love which is not conditioned,
Which Is Not Inhibited
It doesn't want any respite or it doesnt' want
Any return Nirvaj.
But the conditionings are too much
First problem of conditioning comes to you
When You think that this condition makes Me hate someone
Or I cannot Love Someone
because this is the condition.
But actually,
The conditioning itself
Is so absurd
If you see it one by one
To make simple
I would like to understand
The conditioning part
Where
I read once an article
Interesting one
Who killed a romance
So he said that
Hairdressers
I was wondering how is he connecting romance with the hairdressers, because people used
to go a hairdresser and one say hair dressing like by person.
So He would said that,"I love that headdressing."
Now supposing his fiance or wife wore another type of hairedressing – because every day
Then immediately the husband would say,
Oh I hate you because of your hairdressing.
Because he loves one type of hair dress that's why
He loves otherwise if you have another
Hairdress You hate it
To Say That i don't like It and i Like
It itself is a sign
That this conditioning
Is too much
You make a proper hairdress and you dress up properly
And then suddenly people say, Oh I hate it.
Who are YOU? What right we have got to say that
To anyone
You're not the judge appointed by any law courts
So why do We say
To hurt someone
Say
I HATE IT
On contrary
You must say that
Alright
I like this, but you could do better.
That's the sign of love
where we want a person to be dressed up in way that is appealing
But it on very, very baser level we see people
Then go further
To seeing how intelligent he was
How smart and charismatic
he is, how charming – that's another word which very illusive.
These are also kind of conditionings in the mind
That you think a particular style
Of person
Is a lovable
Person and to love them
It so much outside
Or some people actually do not love
But sure they love
Because somebody has more money
And with this money
He will be part with
No doubt
But you love that person because he has more money or a better car, or is in the best dress
whatever it may be.
So this kind of an idea one also have as killer for love – if Love Is Killed Joy
Is Lost You cannot have joy without love I say joy and love both are just same then
When it gets even subtler and subtler, then we start say loving our own children – that's
very common.
I mean of course also some people don't love their child, they are all kinds but
And then they go on, this is my child and that's again the death of love.
As I told you before – the sap of a tree rises goes to every fruit or leaf or part
and comes back, it's not attached.
If you are attach to one part or
two-one flower because
It is more beautiful then
the tree will die
And the flower
Will also die
So that' s a death of
The love
so You have
To Have Love
Which doesn't get entangled
Or Attached
Every time I tell like this
They say how to do
The love of the Spirit is of that kind.
Love, of conditioned mind
Is different
A conditioned mind can
Love in a limited way
Because it's condition
Then greatest enemy
Of love
Is ego within us
Which like a balloon
On top off our head
And this ego gives us
Very big tension
The conditioning of course like they see, say for example a carpet.
Now it is according to their conditionings not good so
They'll Say oh what a carpet It Is or something
This kind Of Conditioning
Of very low level and the higher level at
Most that you love your own country
So my Country's the best
Whether it is killing people, whether
It's destroying the world peace.
Its all right because I belong to a particular country
So its best we can never criticize our
Country and countrymen
It goes on subtler
And settler but
On intelligence side
Is even worse
Because intelligently if you have understood
That something good then nobody
Can save
Because through your brain
You've understood
Actually
It is very surprising, I was reading the book written by Rabindranath Tagore and an Englishman
had given a beautiful rephrase to that – an introduction. And he said
That the creativity
Is killed in
The West
So He asked
A gentleman who
Was Indian critic
He said, don't you criticize your poets?
You do not have people who are critics.
Yes yes we have they criticize
So what did he criticized
Oh! They can criticize that
this time there was no rain
so had problems and things
No-no
We're thinking about the poet
Do they criticize a poet
Do they criticize an artist
So say, is it meant for criticism?
It's created.
Whatever he felt
was created but supposing
He has put something very vulgar
then of course we don't like
But if it is
Created by a beautiful mind
Has to be beautiful
Then you dont criticize
Says no because
We cannot create
Like that
so what business
Have You got
To Create
This Is how
Now, intelligently what we have done?
We've norms about everything – about art and about every creation.
You don't like this carpet why because it doesn´t appeal to our intellectual understanding
of the norms which are reached in that frame so you can even create one inch of
unauthorized action. It is unauthorised, anadikarchishta and unauthorized – you have no authority
to criticize! You can't do anything so why should we criticize? Better appreciate
it for yourself that your are not in authority or worthy of it to criticize. If you're
You know, you are a slave of your ego.
Whatever Your Ego dictates and Your intelligence – so-called intelligence brings to point
towards some norm."
And then it becomes the collective ego off particular community or for country
or for particular ideologies is collected.
So they say oh we see this thing no art that's the reason why cannot have
any more in art. We can't have Rembrandt, we cannot! Poor Rembrandt must've himself
suffered a lot – you know Gauguin suffered a lot all these artists suffered a lot even
Michelangelo suffered a lot not only monetarily but otherwise criticized, criticized, criticized
so I think people are given up…I met an artist who had done lots of artwork and
I don't want to show it's created for Myself, as you would like to see.
It was beautiful – very beautiful!
Why didn' t You just say no use?
People will criticize Me and I do this for My own pleasure
they'll spoil the whole joy of My creation."
So one basic thing we should avoid is to criticize others
Better to criticize yourself
Criticize your self, criticize your brothers or sisters
criticize your country, criticize all the habits you have and laugh at yourself is
best way. If You know how to laugh
At Yourself then
We will not object or we'll
Not stand in
The way of any creativity
Of another person
So with ego
It becomes so unauthorized
You can criticize anything
Which you are right
Who has given
This right
To criticize
Is a question one should ask
How can we criticize anyone?
As saints, as you are now of course
You Can make out who is caught up
Who has given bad vibrations
Who Has the problem
It's not conditioning
it' snot just your doing because there some ego
but Your feeling on your fingertips
Its an actual feeling within you
It's the bodha by which you know, then what should do?
In your love. You have to tell that person
if possible this is wrong with him – better be corrected
but in a way he does it on contrary
If we can tell them away
He becomes even worse than who they are
We haven't loved those persons at all
Allow everybody
To grow
There're many people in Sahaja Yoga
Who were very good
Excellent! No doubt
But also there are some people who we can call as very difficult, really.
There's sort of a crack in their head or something that part is missing sometimes
–some screws are loose I think–
Sometimes they behave like clowns
and you have known somebody just can't help them
They could be intelligent otherwise
They could be very sharp otherwise, but in Sahaja Yoga they cannot come down to that
level where you can say now the growth is possible.
Supposing Mother Earth was hot like sun there would have been no growth or it was cold
like moon, there would have been no growth.
It had to come the center where it had both
things in proper proportions
To grow
In same way a human being has
to work out
that you keep moderation
and balance
And understand
not go to extremes of anything
That balance
You learn when you love someone
In Sahaja Yoga as we know
that we have to ask some people
leave Sahaja Yoga.
This is out of love for them
because once they go up
the improve, I've seen their tremendously
but when there are inside
the sahaja yoga community
They become a nuisance and
want be more nuisances
Because then ego plays
part maybe conditioning plays
apart whatever it is
.They wanted to be a nuisance
so you have asked him
But please now, depart for a while.
Now if that nuisance value is lost in the person then he has to be straight forward
– it cannot anymore any more a nuisance and logically you can appeal
If we tell this person why do they want us out?
They are very disgustingly troublesome I know but you have
Show complete patience and complete understanding,
And you must talk like a person who loves.
Love has such power that nobody wants to do something
That will suggest they don't love
Very powerful thing it is
It binds people in such beautiful manner
that one wants to do something, for example you want
give Me flower because You know I love flowers.
So if we gave me a flower
it would suggest that Mother We Love Him
See just as such
I Know That You Love Me
but You Just Want To Sort Of Reinforce It
The Thought In Me
so If You Give Me A Flower
Show Your Love
An Expression
of
your
Inner
Feeling For Me
All These Material Things Can Be Used
To Express Your Love
They can be very easily expressed in such a manner that another person knows what is
love.
But the whole power of Sahastrara, it's Love!
So if you see this brain has to love – Brain Has To Love after now verifying the powers
of Sahaja Yoga through your brain and intelligence.
If you reach a point where understand that no, it's not use analyzing, synthesizing
doing all these things is just love – simple Love!
So the same Sahasrara which has been used before this brain for analyzing or criticizing
for doing all kinds of nonsensical things, now wants to laugh and enjoy the love.
And there is a culmination where brain just loves that it's situation one has
reach – It Just Loves!
Which knows only Love because He has seen The Power Of Love
You reach certain logical conclusion
Then you see point like Adi Shankara wrote so many thing
like Vivekachuramani, this that and all those treatise.
And then he gives up! He says no nothing.
Just writes the praise of Mother finished
So once you reach
That point we can say now
You are in Nirvikalpa because there is no Vikalpa
There's not doubt on your head
Because when love you don't doubt
No question only
When think you doubt but
But if you love you just love
Because you enjoy love and that's why love is joy, and joys are love.
So after so many days the Sahastrara has been opened out
we have to open our Sahasrara again
through all meditative processes
for understanding ourselves an others
may be logically reaching at point
there no way now
We've reached
To the end of it now, the whole logic has ended up.
Now jump in The Ocean Of Love – finished!
Once you've jumped into The Ocean Of Love
there's nothing to be done
just enjoy every wave off it
Every hue on it
Every touch-offit
That is what one should learn
by reasoning that Sahaja Yoga
Love is nothing but is love.
May God bless you all!
